context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. Reference-driver supply map now keeps refarm-plugin-wit internal and treats refarm:plugin@0.1.0 as the durable WIT supply surface.
current_tasks: @refarm.dev/cli/capability-index now records refarm:plugin@0.1.0 and the refarm-plugin-wit Cargo package as internal supply targets instead of publication candidates.

packages/DISTRIBUTION_STATUS.md and docs/REFERENCE_AGENT_DRIVER_RESEARCH.md document that refarm-plugin-wit stays publish=false until runtime packaging policy and daily-driver evidence justify promotion.

Validation passed: capability-index vitest, packages/cli type-check, packages/cli build, validate-packages, git diff --check, after-edit, commit, and after-commit; after-commit got full Turbo cache hit for CLI validation.
next_actions: Keep WIT/component publication planning on validate-packages plus capability-index supply-map evidence before touching npm/crates publishing.
Next slice can add a plan-only release preflight that reports internal/hold/candidate targets without building WASM.
Keep @refarm.dev/pi-agent private until plugin artifact policy and daily-driver gate justify a package candidate.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
